page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion - Photo File 02 ADAM Soldier at the 2015 A.D. -
text:
Neon Genesis Evangelion - Photo File 02 ADAM Soldier at the 2015 A.D. - is an artbook published by Kadokawa Shoten on 15 October 1996. https://www.amazon.co.jp/%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3PHOTO-FILE-02-ADAM%E2%80%952015%E5%B9%B4%E3%81%AE%E6%88%A6%E5%A3%AB%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1/dp/4048526812/ 

Overview

The book is dedicated to the male character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series. It consists of a collection of screenshots from the series along with some information about these characters. The book is divided into several parts, each dedicated to a character: Shinji Ikari, Tōji Suzuhara, Kensuke Aida, Gendo Ikari, Kōzō Fuyutsuki, Ryoji Kaji, Shigeru Aoba and Makoto Hyuga. The layout takes on the appearance of a fake NERV confidential file. It also quickly introduces the Evangelions and the Angels. Notes are available at the end of the book with advertisements for figurines.
